subcodes.first_line: A time hath elapsed since the nightingales of the divine garden have fallen silent, and the parrots of spiritual Egypt have ceased their sweet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: چندی گذشت که عندلیبان بستان الهی مخمود گشته اند و طوطیان مصر معنوی از شکرهای
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
